# Impressum {-}

**Scientometrics in R: Bibliometrics, Network Science, and Research Evaluation**

© 2026 Raban Heller. ORCID: [0000-0001-8006-9742](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8006-9742).

Content released under the [Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/) (CC BY-SA 4.0).

Source code released under the [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT).

Published online: <https://r-heller.github.io/scientometrics-in-r/>
Source repository: <https://github.com/r-heller/scientometrics-in-r>

Version: 0.1.0 · Build date: `r Sys.Date()`

## Suggested citation {-}

> Heller, R. (2026). *Scientometrics in R: Bibliometrics, Network Science, and Research Evaluation*. <https://r-heller.github.io/scientometrics-in-r/>

## Disclaimer {-}

This book is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The author assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions.

## Contact {-}

For corrections, suggestions, or issues: <https://github.com/r-heller/scientometrics-in-r/issues>
